title: Tick 16: write ADR 0001 rubric-calibration recording the D3 confusion matrix and the calibration baseline decisions
question: Does docs adrs 0001-rubric-calibration md record the D3 confusion matrix on floor 3.5 and document the calibration baseline decisions including why the ratchet to 4.0 is deferred and how to re-run the calibration?
success_criteria: docs adrs 0001-rubric-calibration md exists with a Status Accepted line and a Date of 2026-05-22
the ADR records TP=20 FN=0 TN=20 FP=0 accuracy=1.0 precision=1.0 recall=1.0 from the 2026-05-22 evals results file
the ADR records that every rubric dimension fires in isolation across the failing fixture buckets a* b* c* d* e* f*
the ADR explicitly defers the ratchet to floor 4.0 to B5 and names the calibration shoulder needed before that ratchet can land

capabilities: ADR 0001 rubric-calibration md present with Status Accepted
D3 confusion matrix records TP=20 FN=0 TN=20 FP=0 with all-1.0 metrics
every rubric dimension fires in isolation across the failing bucket prefixes
ratchet to 4.0 is deferred to B5 with the calibration shoulder requirement documented
